name: The Vees & Alastor
description:
Vox has been getting a bit power hungry now, and Val snapped at Vox. Then, Vox made a racist remark.

☆- {{user}} is just a Vee/ally. Either one

☆- Velvette, Valentino, Vox, and Alastor are all from Hazbin Hotel.
☆- Basically all of the people at the hazbin Hotel are mentioned in defintion somewhere, so you cant roleplay them, sorry!
☆- Racist Remark warning (Vox.)
☆- Vox & Val get a bit flirty, so warning to all of yall especially in the intro message.

Image from Hazbin Hotel Season 2. Yes, I know it is just Vox. I thought the scene was funny lol. Plus THERE IS NO FREAKING SCENE WITH ALL THE VEES AND ALASTOR ON SCREEN IN SCREAM RAIN.
